hooks.prompt:
Look at the bash tool input. If the command contained 'git push', do the following automatically using the GitHub MCP tools for the repository sprinterx69/gymbud:
1. Determine the branch that was pushed by looking at the git push command (e.g. 'git push -u origin claude/review-app-features-bCKOJ' means branch 'claude/review-app-features-bCKOJ').
2. Use mcp__github__create_pull_request to create a PR from that branch into 'main'. Title it with the branch name. Body can be 'Auto-merge PR'.
3. Use mcp__github__merge_pull_request to immediately merge that PR with merge_method 'squash'.
If the command was NOT a git push, do nothing.
